versionImpact.rationale: This release opens the initial white paper publication artifact and npm package surface for downstream paper-site consumers.

surfaceImpacts.rationale: The repository introduces the first public Kungfu product white paper content as a versioned publication artifact.
The repository now publishes Buildchain-managed PDF, publication manifest, passport, source bundle, and immutable archive registry facts.
The repository introduces @kungfu-tech/paper-kungfu-product-white-paper as the package coordinate for site and agent consumption.
The repository adds Buildchain release promotion, Trusted Publishing, GitHub Release assets, and release passport evidence.

summary: The first managed white paper release is minor-impact because it creates the public publication/package surfaces and release evidence model.
